speaker: niu
text: [w]hile we are aware that CDER is using the vaccine data to explore new calculations and various deviations of analysis parameters in disproportionality analysis, I haven't been, and are unable to, work as a collaborator with you on this project due to our higher priority work, and because this sort of statistical development work falls outside of my area of expertise.
context: Niu rebuffed Szarfman, declining to collaborate on the new methodology with language drafted by Zinderman.
